description: CompositionBrown round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed neckline and graphic print on the chestFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsVintage styling on this classic T-shirt is a sure fire way of upping your fashion statement in your off-duty ensembles.
